Crash Detection Fatal Acceleration Threshold

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x14
Size:
0x4

Description

Determines fatal crash acceleration limit.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] THRESH rw 0x7d THRESH

Field Descriptions

THRESH - THRESH

Fatal crash acceleration threshold. units of micro Gs, default is ~0.5G (range: +- 8G, 12 bit signed)
